content.problemStatement:
A particular month has 303030 days, numbered from 111 to 303030. 

Day 111 is a Monday, and the usual 777-day week is followed. 

So day 222 is Tuesday, day 333 is Wednesday, and so on.

Every Saturday and Sunday is a holiday. 

There are NNN festival days, which are also holidays. 

**Note** that it is possible for a festival day to occur on a Saturday or Sunday.

You are given the dates of the festivals. Determine the total number of holidays in this month.


Input Format

The first line of input contains a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains an integer NNN denoting the number of festival days.
The second line of each test case contains NNN **distinct** space-separated integers A1,A2,‚Ä¶ANA_1, A_2, \ldots A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,‚Ä¶AN‚Äč, denoting the festival days. Note that the AiA_iAi‚Äč are **not necessarily given in sorted order.**


Output Format
For each test case, output a new line containing the total number of holidays.
constraints: 1‚Č§Ai‚Č§301 \leq A_i \leq 301‚Č§Ai‚Äč‚Č§30 and All the AiA_iAi‚Äč are distinct

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test Case 111: Days 6,13,206, 13, 206,13,20 and 272727 are Saturdays, and days 7,14,21,287, 14, 21, 287,14,21,28 are Sundays. The festivals fall on day 555 and day 777, but day 777 is already a Sunday. This gives us 999 holidays in total ‚ÄĒ days 5,6,7,13,14,20,21,27,285, 6, 7, 13, 14, 20, 21, 27, 285,6,7,13,14,20,21,27,28.
Test Case 222: Days 6,13,206, 13, 206,13,20 and 272727 are Saturdays, and days 7,14,21,287, 14, 21, 287,14,21,28 are Sundays. The festivals fall on day 111, day 666, and day 232323. This gives us 101010 holidays in total ‚ÄĒ days 1,6,7,13,14,20,21,23,27,281, 6, 7, 13, 14, 20, 21, 23, 27, 281,6,7,13,14,20,21,23,27,28.
Test Case 333: Days 6,13,206, 13, 206,13,20 and 272727 are Saturdays, and days 7,14,21,287, 14, 21, 287,14,21,28 are Sundays. The only festival is on day 131313, which is already a holiday. This gives us 888 holidays in total ‚ÄĒ days 6,7,13,14,20,21,27,286, 7, 13, 14, 20, 21, 27, 286,7,13,14,20,21,27,28.
